title: Henry Zeffman: What does Keir Starmer do next after Andy Burnham's Makerfield win?
description: Discussion about the prime minister's future ramps up after Makerfield by-election.

title: Burnham says Labour has final chance to change after Makerfield by-election win
description: The outgoing Greater Manchester mayor held off a challenge from Reform UK, behind by more than 9,000 votes.

title: Farage blames Makerfield defeat on anti-Starmer votes
description: The Reform UK leader says he is "disappointed" with his party's performance in the key by-election.

title: Energy bills, business rates and HS2: What are Burnham's potential policies?
description: After winning the Makerfield by-election, we look at what policies Andy Burnham has advocated - including transport, education and energy.

title: The key figures in Andy Burnham's inner circle
description: The MPs and advisers likely to be influential if Burnham succeeds in gaining the keys to Number 10.

title: Scottish Conservatives win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
description: The Tories take Aberdeen South, while the SNP wins in Arbroath and Broughty Ferry.

title: What is Burnham's path to becoming Labour leader and PM?
description: How could MPs who want Sir Keir Starmer to be replaced force a leadership contest and who could stand?

title: MP arrested on suspicion of assault and coercion
description: The Lib Dem MP for Tewkesbury Cameron Thomas has had the whip suspended pending a police investigation.
